features: At Vo5 we believe hair shouldn’t be dull, life shouldn’t be boring and you should never restrict your self expression
Vo5 Cherish My Colour Shampoo provides vibrancy and shine for coloured hair – with UV filter
Helps coloured hair to be protected and nourished
With 5 vital oils: Argan, Jojoba, Apricot, Avocado and Grapeseed oil
Follow up with Vo5 Cherish My Colour conditioner for even more vibrancy and shine
description: Product Description At Vo5 we believe hair shouldn’t be dull, life shouldn’t be boring and you should never restrict your self expression. Vo5 Cherish My Colour Shampoo is infused with 5 luscious Vital Oils, designed to nourish and protect your locks. Provides vibrancy and shine for coloured hair – with UV filter. Enriched with 5 vital oils: Argan, Jojoba, Apricot, Avocado and Grapeseed oil. Vo5 Cherish My Colour Shampoo is a versatile product and is ideal for achieving protected and nourished coloured hair. How to use: Massage into wet hair, lather and feel the shampoo, with Vital Oils, do its job. Rinse thoroughly. Follow up with Vo5 Cherish My Colour conditioner for vibrancy and shine. You’re now ready to style! Tip: Create your perfect look with the full Vo5 Sleek and Shine range. If you liked Vo5 Cherish My Colour Shampoo, be sure to check out the other Vo5 products in the range to remix your style and experiment with your hair even further! Don’t forget to leave a product review and share your best hair tips. Vo5: for hair play whatever your style For more style and music inspiration, follow Vo5 on social. Caution: Avoid contact with eyes. In case of contact, rinse thoroughly with clean water. Ingredients Aqua, Sodium Laureth Sulfate, Cocamidopropyl Betaine, Sodium Chloride, Glycerin, Dimethiconol, Sodium Benzoate, Parfum, Glycol Distearate, Carbomer, Citric Acid, Mica, Guar Hydroxypropyltrimonium Chloride, TEA-Dodecylbenzenesulfonate, TEA-Sulfate, Cocamide MEA, PEG-20 Castor Oil, Disodium EDTA, PEG-45M, Phenoxyethanol, Persea Gratissima Oil, Simmondsia Chinensis Seed Oil, Vitis Vinifera Seed Oil, Argania Spinosa Kernel Oil, Prunus Armeniaca Kernel Oil, Silk Amino Acids, Ethylhexyl Methoxycinnamate, Rosmarinus Officinalis Leaf Extract, Helianthus Annuus Seed Oil, Sodium Hydroxide, PPG-6, Amyl Cinnamal, Benzyl Alcohol, Benzyl Salicylate, Citronellol, Limonene, Linalool, CI 77891.
